description_long: This sculpture depicts a human figure dressed in historical attire, likely from the 18th century, featuring a long coat, breeches, and a tricorn hat. The figure stands upright with one hand raised to the head in a gesture resembling a salute, while the other hand rests on the hip. The clothing is detailed with visible buttons and a high collar, and the boots are pointed. The overall form is solid and robust, with a sense of formality and presence. The surface appears to be uniformly dark, possibly bronze or a similar metal, with a glossy finish that reflects light at certain angles. The sculpture is life-sized and would be a prominent feature in an urban environment.
description: A life-sized sculpture of a person in 18th-century attire, saluting with one hand and the other on the hip, finished in a dark, glossy material.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full figure, with the right hand raised in a salute and the left hand on the hip, highlighting the detailed coat and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view emphasizing the profile of the tricorn hat, the extended coat, and the arm bent at the hip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the coat, the tricorn hat, and the stance with both feet visible.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the arm raised in salute and the side profile of the face and hat.
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is plain and does not indicate installation environment.
